title: MPGet Statement
description: This is used when obtaining the value of the properties of the Mass Property Object.
notes: This is used when obtaining the value of the properties of the Mass Property Object.
examples:
Function MPTest Integer iVar String sVar$ 'The setting of each property MPSet MP1.Label, "MP1_Label" MPSet MP1.Description, "MP1_Description" MPSet MP1.Mass, 1 MPSet MP1.GravityCenter, 0, 0, 100 'Acquiring the numbers MPGet MP(MP1_Label).Number, iVar Print iVar 'Acquiring the labels MPGet MP((iVar)).Label, sVar$ Print sVar$
Fend
